message:
test(outcome): add comprehensive unit tests for outcome.ts core functions

Add 50 new tests covering:
- detectSentiment: positive/negative/neutral pattern matching
- scoreImplicitFeedback: all signal combinations (outcome, duration, errors, retries, sentiment)
- recordOutcome: persistence with sanitization
- loadOutcomes: loading with limit, malformed line handling, sanitization

Properly isolates tests by changing cwd to temp directory to avoid
using the repo's .cass directory.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
